prompt_used: Create original premium horror artwork for a commercial alternate reality investigation game. Subject: ending illustration. Story world: Tape 17: Pinewatch. Premise: A recovered camcorder tape rewrites itself every midnight.. Setting: Closed wilderness watch station and ranger tunnels. Threat presence: The Editor. Recurring motifs: timecode burn-ins, camera clicks, forest sirens. Ending card for "Clean Resolution" (JUSTICE). Summary: You preserve the authentic footage chain and rescue the final survivor.. Deliver emotional closure with sequel-hook tension.. Subgenre: found-footage investigation. Tone: GROUNDED. Immediate scene brief: Tape 17: Pinewatch - Clean Resolution Ending Card. Grounded cinematic horror, photoreal detail, rich atmosphere, practical lighting, believable materials, analog grain, subtle lens bloom, visible depth. Absolutely no visible letters, words, signage, subtitles, captions, runes, glyphs, pseudo-text, document copy, watermark, logo, title treatment, UI overlay, labels, poster typography, or debug text. Compose a high-end key art image with a dominant focal threat, layered foreground and background storytelling, a strong silhouette, and clear thematic clues embedded in the environment. Keep it elegant, unsettling, and market-ready.
